name: punchwall-shared-excavation-field
description: Validate the solid multiplayer depth block field, per-block HP, physics fracture, passable holes, tier hardness, and player-controlled camera.

steps.label: reset shared field before geometry assertions

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local f=root["Depth Blocks"] local count=#f:GetChildren() local perLayer={} local minX,maxX,minY,maxY,minZ,maxZ=math.huge,-math.huge,math.huge,-math.huge,math.huge,-math.huge local materials={} local uniform=true for _,b in ipairs(f:GetChildren()) do local layer=b:GetAttribute("Depth") perLayer[layer]=(perLayer[layer] or 0)+1 minX=math.min(minX,b.Position.X-b.Size.X/2) maxX=math.max(maxX,b.Position.X+b.Size.X/2) minY=math.min(minY,b.Position.Y-b.Size.Y/2) maxY=math.max(maxY,b.Position.Y+b.Size.Y/2) minZ=math.min(minZ,b.Position.Z-b.Size.Z/2) maxZ=math.max(maxZ,b.Position.Z+b.Size.Z/2) materials[b.Material.Name]=true uniform=uniform and (b.Size-Vector3.new(4,4,4)).Magnitude<0.01 and b.CanCollide and b.Anchored end local layersOK=true for i=1,75 do layersOK=layersOK and perLayer[i]==72 end local unique=0 for _ in pairs(materials) do unique+=1 end local first=f.DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02 local last=f.DepthBlock_L075_C06_R02 return H:JSONEncode({count=count,layersOK=layersOK,uniform=uniform,width=maxX-minX,height=maxY-minY,length=maxZ-minZ,firstHP=first:GetAttribute("MaxHP"),lastHP=last:GetAttribute("MaxHP"),firstTier=first:GetAttribute("Tier"),lastTier=last:GetAttribute("Tier"),uniqueMaterials=unique,bossDepth=root.Walls["Titan Server Wall"]:GetAttribute("Depth")})

steps.label: solid field dimensions and tier materials

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local forest=root.Polish["World 1 Forest"] local trees,canopies,grounds,rocks,courseBuildings=0,0,0,0,0 for _,d in ipairs(forest:GetDescendants()) do local role=d:GetAttribute("VisualRole") if role=="ForestTree" then trees+=1 elseif role=="ForestCanopy" then canopies+=1 elseif role=="ForestGround" then grounds+=1 elseif role=="ForestRock" then rocks+=1 end end for _,d in ipairs(root.Polish["City Decor"]:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("BasePart") and d.Position.Z<0 and d:GetAttribute("TextureStyle")=="BuildingFacadeWindows" then courseBuildings+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({theme=forest:GetAttribute("WorldTheme"),trees=trees,canopies=canopies,grounds=grounds,rocks=rocks,courseBuildings=courseBuildings})

steps.label: world one uses a natural forest environment

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=7,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local r=c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=1,column=6,row=2}) local f=workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Blocks"] local b=f.DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02 local n=f.DepthBlock_L001_C07_R02 return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,outcome=r.outcome,targetHP=b:GetAttribute("HP"),neighborHP=n:GetAttribute("HP"),targetBroken=b:GetAttribute("Broken"),neighborBroken=n:GetAttribute("Broken")})

steps.label: damage affects only one shared block

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local r=c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=1,column=6,row=2}) local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local b=root["Depth Blocks"].DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02 local n=root["Depth Blocks"].DepthBlock_L001_C07_R02 local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(b.Position) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,outcome=r.outcome,broken=b:GetAttribute("Broken"),passable=not b.CanCollide and not b.CanQuery and b.Transparency==1,neighborHP=n:GetAttribute("HP"),fragments=#root["Depth Physics Debris"]:GetChildren(),depth=r.Depth,score=r.Score,playerInside=(p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position-b.Position).Magnitude<1})

steps.label: starter fist one-shots a block and opens a physics hole

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local b=root["Depth Blocks"].DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02 local gui=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD return H:JSONEncode({replicatedBroken=b:GetAttribute("Broken"),replicatedHole=not b.CanCollide and b.Transparency==1,camera=workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraType.Name,autoFocus=gui:GetAttribute("CombatCameraActive")})

steps.label: shared hole replicates while camera stays player controlled

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=1,column=6,row=1}) local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local f=root["Depth Blocks"] local open=0 for _,row in ipairs({1,2}) do local b=f:FindFirstChild(("DepthBlock_L001_C06_R%02d"):format(row)) if b and b:GetAttribute("Broken") and not b.CanCollide then open+=1 end end local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local center=(f.DepthBlock_L001_C06_R01.Position+f.DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02.Position)/2 p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(center) local snap=c:Invoke("Snapshot") return H:JSONEncode({openBlocks=open,openingWidth=4,openingHeight=8,playerInside=(p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position-center).Magnitude<1,broken=snap.BrokenDepthBlocks,score=snap.Score})

steps.label: two cubic blocks form a full character passage

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=100000,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0}) local locked=c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=9,column=6,row=2}) c:Invoke("SetStats",{WallLevel=3}) local open=c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=9,column=6,row=2}) return H:JSONEncode({lockedOK=not locked.ok,reason=locked.reason,required=locked.requiredLevel,openOK=open.ok,tier=open.Tier,depth=open.Depth})

steps.label: deeper material tier requires stronger wall level
